text:
Once upon a time, in a quiet small town nestled between rolling hills and dense forests, lived a boy named Max. Max loved exploring the woods behind his house, which smelled of damp earth and fresh pine-scented needles. He had a particular favorite spot where the sunlight filtered through the leaves at just the right angle. His favorite things there were the shiny beetle tracks and the way the old oak tree would sway slightly with the soft breeze.

One day, while picking berries from the bush near his favorite oak, Max noticed something odd. A bright star seemed to be hanging from nowhere special in the sky. Curious, Max followed the shimmering trail deeper into the woods until he stumbled across a clearing. In the center was a fountain, its waters iridescent and still. Beside it stood an ancient tree with leaves that glowed faintly in the moonlight.

Max watched, mesmerized by the scene, when suddenly, a voice echoed through the clearing.
